{"LastUpdate":"2026-07-12 20:50 UTC","Overview":{"ReportDate":"12 July 2026","ReportTime":"9:14 AM","ReportAnnouncements":"It is a winter wonderland at Falls today and it is still coming down! Please take it easy on the roads getting up and ensure you are carrying chains. Currently chains will be fitted to 2WDs, please drive slowly and to the conditions when visiting. ","ReportWhatsHappening":"

Whether you’re hitting the slopes, exploring the village or enjoying tobogganing at Windy Corner with Everest Sports, there’s plenty to experience this week.

We have a great lineup of events and activations, including Twilight Tuesdays, Thursday night fireworks, live music and après experiences throughout the resort.

Planning to go tobogganing? Book your Windy Corner session with Everest Sports here

Discover what’s happening across the village. Explore the What’s On page HERE

Panorama loop has been packed and tilled, however there is still a small bare patch next to the boat ramp.","CrossCountryConditions":"Firm Packed","CrossCountryCover":"Fair","CrossCountryLastGroomed":"12 July 2026","CrossCountryTotalGroomed":"6","CrossCountryTotalGroomed24":"6"},"SlopeMaintenance":{"Comments":"","CubicMetersofSnow":"","CurrentStatus":"On","GroomerChoice":"-","LastUpdateDate":"05 July 2026","LastUpdateTime":"11:44 AM","AverageSnowMaking":"0"},"Parks":{"Park":[{"ParkName":"Castle Park","ParkDetail":"Ruined Castle","ParkStatus":"closed"},{"ParkName":"Drover's Dream Park","ParkDetail":"Top of Drover's Dream","ParkStatus":"closed"},{"ParkName":"Panorama Park","ParkDetail":"Drover's Dream","ParkStatus":"closed"}]},"Patrol":{"PatrolDate":"12 July 2026","PatrolTime":"6:15 AM","PatrolNaturalSnowDepth":"43","PatrolFreshSnow":"14","PatrolVillageBowl":"47","PatrolSunValley":"51","PatrolNorthSide":"30","PatrolLastSnowFall":"12 July 2026","SeasonalSnowfallToDate":"","PatrolSnowCover":"Good morning! It's a winter wonderland up in Falls Creek this morning. The front truly rolled in and hit us last night. With temperatures sitting in the negatives since midnight and precip coming in we've gotten on average 14cms of new snow! Temps are predicted to stay cold all day with a top of -1 and more snow is on the way. Have fun out there, make sure to wear plenty of layers, be safe and keep on eye on the falls creek app for any updates or changes on terrain openings.","PatrolForecast":"Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Snow falling above 900 metres. The chance of a thunderstorm near the New South Wales border. Damaging winds possible in the south. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 5 and 12.","PatrolSnowChains":"Fitting on 2WD.
